reviews.text:
Dr. Jennifer is amazing! And I’m not just saying that because she’s my sister!!

Back in 2020 I suddenly developed eczema around my eyes. My eyes would become so puffy and Itchy that I wouldn’t want to go outside and see anybody. It seemed to come on randomly. I would wake up with it and not know why.

I saw my dermatologist and an allergy specialist and no one could tell me what was going on.

My sister suggested it could be a food sensitivity. I wasn’t sure because I eat healthy. But lo and behold, she was right. I was sensitive to healthy foods like chicken, eggs, and sesame seeds (and a few others). As soon as I cut those foods out of my diet, all of my symptoms went away.

We worked on healing my gut with supplements, stress reduction, and food trigger avoidance.

Fast-forward a couple of years with my most recent food sensitivity test. None of those food showed up on the test! I was shocked.

I slowly started to re-introduce them back into my diet and I no longer have eczema flareups after eating them. I’m so happy to not have to be extra careful with eating anymore, especially when eating out.

Dr. Jennifer is truly the best!!

The clinic itself is clean, modern, and runs on time, which I appreciate. It doesn’t have that typical medical office vibe — it feels more like a performance-focused health center.

If you’re a guy who’s been feeling off, low energy, or just not operating at your best, I’d definitely recommend getting your levels checked here. Solid team, no fluff, and results that actually matter.

What stands out most is his perfect blend of expertise and bedside manner. He’s incredibly knowledgeable, diving deep into the science without overwhelming you, and he’s direct in his explanations—no sugarcoating, just clear facts that help you understand your options. reviews.text: I've been a patient of Dr. Jacobson's for 9 years, and he truly changed my life.  I came to him in the midst of severe perimenopause- anxiety, sleepless nights and hot flashes- after other doctors gave me antidepressants instead of addressing the root cause.  Dr Jacobson ran thorough bloodwork, explained everything clearly and started me on a personalized bioidentical hormone plan.  My symptoms improved dramatically, and I felt like myself again. He is knowledgeable, compassionate and truly listens.  Highly recommend!

reviews.name: places/ChIJ4V8IRkeYwokRYZ_rgYl8iDU/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURieU5XXzRRRRAB
reviews.text:

In my initial decision to work with Dr. Jacobson I confronted the uncertainties involved by a male in commencing a course of health improvement utilizing hormones.  My concerns were not only unnecessary but unfounded.  My overall health, inclusive of considerations such as lack of energy, fatigue and mental outlook have all substantively and measurably improved and are at levels I did not believe were again attainable.
Dr. Jacobson possess the unique combination of expertise coupled with the ability to communicate with patients in a manner which provides information, education and guided recommendations that are understandable and only in the best interests of the patient.  Dr. Jacobson treats the doctor and client/patient relationship as a true partnership, taking the time to critically listen and timely and fully respond to the questions and concerns of his clients.
Dr. Jacobson has had a profound positive impact on life.  He is a “gold standard” professional and has my highest confidence and recommendation.

reviews.text:
Its a small clinic. The day I was there I saw one doctor and two nurses working. I was the only patient there at my scheduled appointment time. Michelle drew my blood. And ran the tests. The results were ready in about 10 minutes. So Doctor Chris had my test results when we did the consultation. He gave me all the time I needed to ask questions and he explained how everything works. There was no pressure or attempts to upsale me anything. That was greatly appreciated. I decided to begin TRT treatment that day. I felt that the price was very good for the quality of care that comes along with the membership. Michelle administered my my first dose and a complimentary vitamin shot in the clinic before I left. The whole experience was very easy and comfortable.
The other nurse, can't remember his name, sorry bro, had a pioneer sticker on his water bottle, and we had a little conversation about powerlifting belts when I noticed it. I am glad I went with these guys and I do recommend it if you are interested.

reviews.text:
I had an amazing experience at Bio Restore with Dr. Jordan Buchla! I had been struggling/suffering with plantar fasciitis for quite a while, and the pain was affecting my workouts, daily routine, work, and overall quality of life. After trying different treatments with little to no success, I decided to give Bio Restore a shot. I’m so glad I did.

Dr. Buchla used Bio Wave therapy, and the results have been incredible. The treatment was comfortable, non-invasive, and I started noticing improvement much sooner than I expected. My foot pain has significantly decreased, minimal to no pain, and I’m finally able to move and train without that constant nagging discomfort.

Dr. Buchla is extremely knowledgeable, professional, and genuinely cares about getting real results for her patients. She took the time to explain everything and made me feel confident in the treatment plan from day one.

If you’re dealing with plantar fasciitis or chronic pain, I highly recommend Bio Restore and Dr. Jordan Buchla. This treatment truly made a difference for me, and gave me my life back. Well worth the 45 minute drive, especially when you’re greeted with a warm smile and comforting conversation when you walk through the doors.

reviews.text: Gameday in Southington was highly recommended to me by a coworker. I reached out for an appointment and Will, the owner, contacted me right away. The prices were fair and straightforward. Gameday in Southington is a fantastic place and I would recommend it to anyone looking to optimize their health.

reviews.name: places/ChIJY2pF_UShwokR_v9ApA-oXDY/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25CR2ExbHFhV2t4ZEZaUWRsWjJkbWxuZFZSM1gyYxAB
reviews.text:
At age 59 and well into menopause I came to see Dr. Fleischman in May, 2025.  I was chronically exhausted, not getting restorative sleep and missing my vitality.   Those were my 3 concerns and requests to address.  Fast forward to today, August, 2025 and I feel amazing.   I have my vitality back and my sleep quality improved within 48 hours.
I can’t say enough about her and breadth of knowledge.  Dr. Fleischman takes all the time you need to address your hormone replacement questions, concerns, and requests.  This is not a pressured medical office where you only have a finite amount of time to get educated and your needs met.

I hope more women get to experience the benefits of HRT. We are living longer — we need physicians with current, scientific, updated information; we need the protective benefits of HRT without fear of old and outdated information and place to ask questions. She does it all!!

reviews.name: places/ChIJY2pF_UShwokR_v9ApA-oXDY/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21vdFdHSlFWRkpCZVU5RU5rTTFkblJtTFVONk5rRRAB
reviews.text: Dr Fleishman orders a comprehensive set of bloodwork (in advance of your visit) and takes the time to review it with you along with her recommendations for targeted supplements and/or hormone therapy. reviews.name: places/ChIJtSh6HvKt54kRw-O59U26IaE/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25oc1ZqTlFabEpzY1U1d1gxRnFXVjlGYUVWdlNIYxAB
reviews.text: I started my health journey with Kayse in early December of 2024! I was literally uncomfortable in my own skin! I wasn’t sleeping, I was so moody, I’d lose 3 pounds then gain 4 and was exercising everyday, I was somewhere between peri-menapause and post menapause, the slightest look from someone set me off in tears or paranoid frenzy and my general practioner and OBGYN suggested I do the Mediterranean Diet to lose weight and anxiety medication.  I needed answers and support not a diet (once again and fail and medication that masks the problem ) … I found Kayse who literally changed my life!  HRT helped get me get on track to feeling better and kick - off my mental and weight loss journey! Regular check ins, texts at anytime with questions and support and motivation , blood work, etc… I feel 20 years younger and have so much more confidence and energy and the best part.. I go to sleep at night and stay sleeping!! I highly recommend any woman feeling my symptoms make an appointment now!!
